title: 10D9N Winter Holiday in Australia 2026
details: Highlights: Sydney Opera House, Blue Mountains, Featherdale Wildlife Park, Canberra Parliament House, Melbourne City Tour, Mt Buller Snow Experience, Puffing Billy Train, Yarra Valley, and Yarra Chocolaterie.
flyer: assets/data/packages/oceania/Winter Holidays in Australia 2026/Winter Holidays in Australia 2026.pdf

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA Terminal 1 for airline check-in. Enjoy inflight meals and entertainment. Flight: PR211 MNL–SYD 22:10PM–09:45AM.

Meet your tour coach and guide at the airport. Proceed to Sydney City Tour: The Rocks, Sydney Opera House, Hyde Park, St. Mary’s Cathedral, Parliament House, Royal Botanic Gardens, Sydney Tower, Darling Harbour, and Bondi Beach (if time permits). Enjoy Sydney Harbour Lunch Cruise. Dinner and overnight in Sydney.

itinerary.day_title: Day 3: Full Day Blue Mountain & Featherdale Wildlife Park (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Visit the World Heritage–listed Blue Mountains and see the Three Sisters Rock Formation. Experience Scenic World’s Skyway, Railway, and Cableway. Continue to Featherdale Wildlife Park to see native Australian animals. Dinner and overnight in Sydney.

itinerary.day_title: Day 4: Sealife Aquarium & Madame Tussauds + Birkenhead Factory Outlet (B/L)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at hotel. Visit Sealife Aquarium and Madame Tussauds Wax Museum at Darling Harbour. Afternoon shopping at Birkenhead Point Factory Outlet featuring over 120 brand stores. Return to hotel for overnight stay.
After breakfast, travel for approximately 3 hours to Canberra. Visit Parliament House, Australian War Memorial, and Yarralumla suburb. Check in to your hotel for dinner and overnight in Canberra.
Breakfast at hotel then travel by coach to Melbourne. Lunch en route (own expense). Check in to hotel upon arrival and enjoy buffet dinner.

Breakfast at hotel. Visit Lygon Street, Melbourne University, Royal Exhibition Building, Parliament House, St. Patrick’s Cathedral, Captain Cook’s Cottage (own expense), Fitzroy Gardens, Flinders Street Station, Federation Square, Hosier Lane, ACDC Lane, and Brighton Beach Boxes. Return to hotel after tour.

After breakfast, proceed to Mt. Buller Resort — enjoy snow activities and scenic views of the Victorian Alps. Stop at Mansfield for equipment rental or coffee. Optional: Skiing, gondola, or tobogganing at own expense. Return to Melbourne for dinner and overnight.

itinerary.day_title: Day 9: Yarra Valley + Puffing Billy + Wine Tasting + Yarra Chocolaterie (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, travel to Dandenong Ranges for Puffing Billy steam train ride. Visit Rochford Winery for wine tasting and lunch. End the day at Yarra Valley Chocolaterie for complimentary chocolates. Return to hotel for overnight stay.
Distribute packed breakfasts. Transfer to Melbourne Airport for departure. Flight: PR210 MEL–MNL 08:00AM–13:35PM. Home sweet home!

inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in Melbourne (Holiday Inn Express – Little Collins)
Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Admissions: Scenic World (Skyway/Railway/Cableway), Sealife Aquarium, Madame Tussauds, Puffing Billy Train
exclusions: Mandatory tipping for guide and driver: $90 ($10 per person/day)
flight_details: Philippine Airlines – PR211 MNL–SYD 22:10–09:45 / PR210 MEL–MNL 08:00–13:35

All down payments are non-refundable. Full cancellation charges apply 30 days before flight.
Rebooking allowed only under government restrictions or force majeure, subject to hotel and airline policy.
